sys_script_client.description: 2.6 - moved messages into messages to ensure if changed Template would change also and for internationalization STRY0091258 - TUP - Duration Help Text STRY0091294 - TUP - duration should only be required if Suspense Date is Required STRY0100152 - Certification error 'script' No occurances of pattern for Isloading check
sys_script_client.messages: The projected {0} of one (1) or more Subtasks exceeds the projected {1} of this task
sys_script_client.name: Template - onChange/onLoad Duration
